title: Tetra totem
description:
just a silly resource pack that replaces totem of undying with a chill Tetra plush
this resource pack includes:
•custom model
•custom texture
•custom name
•custom subtitle text
•custom sound effect
body:
this resource pack brings to life a tetra plush from a song "your just like pop music" by YonKaGor, you can modify and use models files however you want by using blockbench

it will replace totem of undying and all releated to it with tetra themed ones!

> rename your totem to 'tetra' to turn it into plush

_character by yonkagor_
